title: woodsia oregana
intro: Woodsia oregana, also known as Oregon cliffbrake, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Woodsiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can aid in the treatment of wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Woodsia oregana include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Woodsia oregana can be made into infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and are typically used to treat a range of health issues, including colds, coughs, and digestive problems.
